Off Calendar Sep-06-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-11-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: B. Fields, CSR #7235

George Rush, Esq. for and with the plaintiff Roman Scott, was sworn and direct examined.

Default has been entered against the Defendant David Marchetti.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant for a declaratory relief Judgment and costs $540.00. See scanned doc. for details.
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
